allow: PowerShell($issues = Invoke-RestMethod -Uri "https://api.github.com/repos/epam/ai-dial-admin-frontend/issues?state=open&per_page=20" -Headers @{ "User-Agent" = "claude-code" }; $issues | Select-Object number, title, state, @{N='labels';E={\($_.labels.name\) -join ','}} | Format-Table -AutoSize -Wrap)
